message: Every day continued on like normal.
It was enough to make you think that this peaceful life could go on for eternity.

Get up in the morning, go to school like everyone else, sit around chatting like everyone else, go to your job like everyone else, take a few hours off just like everyone else. Going through life while doing everything just like everyone else.
But of course, common sense tells me that it can't continue forever.
Even the middle-aged man sleeping on the train, drooling on the seat, was my age once.
At that time, he probably thought those happy days would go on forever, just like me.
But those days slipped away from him while he wasn't looking. First a job, then marriage, then children, and finally buying a house.
Just like that, things accelerate, and before you know it...
He went from living the carefree days of youth to living the life of a middle-aged man.
But he might say this.

name: Old Man
message: "I'm just as young as ever!"

name: Old Man
message: "I'm still young at heart."
At heart, maybe...
No, no. Maybe you're young at heart, but just look at yourself. You're old.
You're nothing like the young man you once were.
Time will continue chugging along, slow and steady, no matter how young you insist you are. Your youthful life will crumble and spoil as time eats away at its edges.
My day-to-day life is definitely different from his.
His day-to-day life is something I can't even begin to imagine.
Or maybe he would talk like this, with a calm (weary?) voice.

name: Old Man
message: "There was a time when I too believed that I would be young forever."

name: Old Man
message: "But then, all of a sudden, my skin was getting thicker (they call it adipose tissue) and hair was growing from places I never thought possible (the first joint of my finger), yet I was losing hair where it really mattered (my head)."

name: Old Man
message: "Suddenly I realized..."

name: Old Man
message: "No one else looked at me as a child anymore."

name: Old Man
message: "Before I knew it, I wasn't just an adult. I was well past that. I was downright old."

name: Old Man
message: "...Someone like you would call me an old fart."
Yeah, totally over the hill.
He doesn't live the same day-to-day life that I understand. He lives the day-to-day life on the other side of the hill.

name: Old Man
message: "Hahahaha..."

name: Old Man
message: "I look old now, but back in the day, everyone was jealous of my disco moves."
Oh, really?

name: Old Man
message: "How about it? Wanna dance?"

name: Yuki
message: "I'd rather not."

name: Old Man
message: "Huh?"
My eyes locked with those of the middle-aged man.
His eyes were dashing.
At that moment, I fell in love with―
No, not really. Of course not.
Today, I was going to Tower Records (a CD store) in Suginomiya to buy a new release by one of my favorite bands.
As you can tell from my clothes, I'm totally... not actually a Visual Kei rocker.
I came to buy a new album by a famous English band.
This band isn't really goth, or goth-loli, or anything dark like that.
Actually, I think there was something called gothic rock in England, but it's not all that dark either.
It's a bit hasty to assume the word gothic implies "dark."
My clothes are dark and black, but the blood running through my veins is white.
Ah.
I'm not sure where that was heading.
Well, who cares about that?
I bought the English rock CD. Yay.
They hadn't released anything in three years.

name: Yuki
message: "Oooh..."
Ah, crap. I can't believe I let out a squeal like that in public.
Oh, no...
"Y-You're..."

name: Yuki
message: "Oh?"
I couldn't believe the way she was looking at me.
Just because I made some noise and struck a pose didn't mean that she needed to stare at me.

name: Yuki
message: "Hmm? Oh, you're..."
From the class next door... Takashima Zakuro-san, I think?

name: Yuki
message: "Takashima... Zakuro-san, was it?"

name: Zakuro
message: "Yes. Hello."

name: Yuki
message: "Ah, hello."

name: Zakuro
message: "Why are you here today?"

name: Yuki
message: "Oh, uh, there's no particular reason. I was buying something, and now I guess I'm just walking around."

name: Yuki
message: "I mean, for someone living near the train station, Suginomiya is the most convenient place to go shopping, right? I suppose you could go all the way out to Shinjuku if you wanted, though."

name: Zakuro
message: "I see. I'm glad."

name: Yuki
message: "Glad?"

name: Zakuro
message: "Yes. I'm glad I got to meet you."

name: Yuki
message: "Okay. I-If you say so."

name: Zakuro
message: "Yes. This might be divine providence."

name: Yuki
message: "Divine providence?"
What providence?

name: Yuki
message: "Um, we've never really talked much, so..."

name: Zakuro
message: "Huh?"

name: Yuki
message: "Huh? Have we?"

name: Zakuro
message: "Ah, no. You're right. You're probably right, but I knew you very well."

name: Yuki
message: "O-Oh, really?"
Why? Did I do something unnecessary and make another enemy?

name: Yuki
message: "Did I do something to tick you off?"

name: Zakuro
message: "Why do you ask?"

name: Yuki
message: "Well, if someone I don't remember all that well says they remember me, it means they're holding some kind of grudge, right?"

name: Zakuro
message: "A grudge against you? Heheh. I'm not holding any grudge."

name: Yuki
message: "I see. Well, that's good to hear."

name: Zakuro
message: "I don't have a bad impression of you."

name: Yuki
message: "That's... good to hear."

name: Zakuro
message: "Not a bad impression at all."

name: Yuki
message: "At all?"

name: Zakuro
message: "Ah. I hope we can have cordial relations."

name: Yuki
message: "Huh?"

name: Yuki
message: "Huh?"

name: Yuki
message: "Mmmgh?!"
Wh-What?
What just happened?

name: Zakuro
message: "I'll give you some of my power."

name: Yuki
message: "Power? Wh-What do you mean?"
B-Besides that, I was just kissed...
By some girl from another class who I hardly even knew.

name: Zakuro
message: "Soon, something amazing will happen."

name: Yuki
message: "S-Something amazing?"
Wait a second.
She wasn't satisfied with a kiss? She wants to do "something amazing" to me?
By "something amazing", she means...

name: Yuki
message: "You mean, like, tribadism?"

name: Zakuro
message: "Tribadism?"

name: Yuki
message: "Ahahaha, nothing. By the way, what is that 'something amazing' you were talking about?"

name: Zakuro
message: "Well, it's..."

name: Zakuro
message: "The sky is really, really full."

name: Yuki
message: "Full of what?"

name: Zakuro
message: "Anxious words."

name: Zakuro
message: "The sky is full of anxious words."

name: Yuki
message: "Um, not full of anxiety, but full of anxious words?"
That would've kind of made sense if she'd said "The sky is full of anxiety," but what did she mean by "anxious words"?

name: Yuki
message: "That's kind of a cool expression."

name: Zakuro
message: "Heheh. It's not a metaphor."
So she really meant it...
Well, let's ignore that for now.

name: Yuki
message: "So, what about it?"

name: Zakuro
message: "The process of absorption has begun."
I didn't really get what she meant. Who was she talking about?

name: Yuki
message: "Who's doing the absorbing?"

name: Zakuro
message: "The world is."
I took a step back and thought to myself.
Her clothes.
I know that style...
Um...

name: Yuki
message: "Wanjuku Style!"

name: Zakuro
message: "Hm?"
No, I really didn't know either.
Let's think about the real essence of this style.
I know it.
This style is a metaphor for the darkness.

name: Yuki
message: "It's V Kei!"

name: Zakuro
message: "Wh-What is?"

name: Yuki
message: "It's Visual Kei!"

name: Zakuro
message: "Yes, I know that, but..."

name: Yuki
message: "Ah, well, I was just wondering if you liked it."
I was going to say she was cosplaying Makki Shoujo or Jakigan, but I figured she would get mad if I said that.

name: Zakuro
message: "Anxious words, and the world that has absorbed them."

name: Zakuro
message: "Do you know what those are?"

name: Yuki
message: "Uh, not really."

name: Zakuro
message: "The heart of the person who will soon die."

name: Zakuro
message: "Therefore, the world..."

name: Zakuro
message: "Will end."

name: Yuki
message: "What?"
I took a second to organize my thoughts.
"Something Amazing" ≠ Tribadism.
"Something Amazing" = The end of the the world.
I understood.
I understood instantly.

name: Yuki
message: "Huh?"

name: Zakuro
message: "You probably can't believe it, right? But I'll protect you."
"Zakuro-chan!"
"Who is this?"
Takashima-san said something weird, and then two strange girls appeared behind her.
It was scary how they were glaring at me.
It looked like they were mad about something.
But what?
"What are you doing with an outsider?"

name: Zakuro
message: "Sorry, but... this person should be fine."
Fine? Fine for what?
"I really don't approve..."

name: Zakuro
message: "Yeah, I understand."
"Please be more careful, Zakuro-chan."

name: Zakuro
message: "Okay..."
More importantly...
Who are these people?
Her... sex partners?
And that's why she suddenly kissed me?
Then the reason why she knew me so well even though I didn't know her was because she was after my body?
And then, and then, her sex partners were mad because she made a pass at an "outsider" (a heterosexual)?
That means...
My chastity is in danger.

name: Yuki
message: "Ahahaha, well then, I'd better be off..."

name: Zakuro
message: "Hey!"

name: Yuki
message: "Yes?!"

name: Zakuro
message: "I'll protect the world, so..."

name: Yuki
message: "Okay?"

name: Zakuro
message: "I won't fail. I can do it."
"Zakuro!"

name: Zakuro
message: "Coming..."
What? What did she just say?
I organized my thoughts.
So that meant...

Takashima-san is a lesbian.
&

Those other girls are her sex friends.
&
That's why they're fighting to protect world peace.
I guess?
Is that... correct?

name: Yuki
message: "I suppose because they're a minority group, they have a lot of interest in world peace and stuff like that."
Right?
We'll go with that. I didn't really want to get involved with them.
"Yuki!"

name: Yuki
message: "Huh?"

name: Yuki
message: "Ah, one of the Wakatsuki sisters... The younger one... Tsukasa?"

name: Tsukasa
message: "Yuki, what are you here for? Your job?"

name: Yuki
message: "No, I'm not."
"What do you mean? Yuki, you have work today, don't you?"

name: Yuki
message: "Oh, uh, you're..."

name: Yuki
message: "Who are you?"

name: Kagami
message: "What the hell?! There's no way you could remember Tsukasa and not remember me!"

name: Yuki
message: "Where there's a will, there's a way. Besides, what's with that attitude, as if it's ridiculous that anyone would ever forget a celeb like you?"

name: Kagami
message: "You grew up with us! There's no way you could remember the younger twin and then forget about the older one!"

name: Tsukasa
message: "Yeah. We've always been together since kindergarten."

name: Yuki
message: "Really? Has it been that long already?"

name: Tsukasa
message: "So, Yuki, what about your job?"

name: Yuki
message: "Unfortunately, I'm taking time off for personal reasons."

name: Tsukasa
message: "You shouldn't take a day off work for personal reasons..."

name: Kagami
message: "Whatever. Let it go, Tsukasa. At this rate, we're going to catch the stupid from her."

name: Tsukasa
message: "Ahahaha. That's not possible."

name: Yuki
message: "No, it just might be."

name: Yuki
message: "You caught Tsukasa's stu―"

name: Yuki
message: "Oww."

name: Kagami
message: "I'll hit you if you say anything bad about Tsukasa."

name: Tsukasa
message: "Onee-chan."

name: Yuki
message: "You should give me that warning before you hit me..."

name: Yuki
message: "So, what are the Wakatsuki sisters doing?"

name: Kagami
message: "We're going home after our club activities, unlike you."

name: Yuki
message: "What do you mean, unlike me? We're both human, aren't we?"

name: Kagami
message: "I don't think anyone would take you for a human."

name: Yuki
message: "Do I look more like a goddess?"

name: Kagami
message: "Hmph... Tsukasa, let's go."

name: Yuki
message: "Kagami's as grumpy as ever."

name: Tsukasa
message: "So you did remember her name."

name: Yuki
message: "Well, I am a tsundere."

name: Tsukasa
message: "Yuki, you know... Being a tsundere isn't an excuse for bullying someone like that."

name: Yuki
message: "I see."

name: Tsukasa
message: "You've always been Onee-chan's role model."

name: Tsukasa
message: "So it wouldn't hurt you to be nice to her once in a while."

name: Yuki
message: "Hmm."

name: Yuki
message: "Maybe I'll think about it if you promise to be nice to me."

name: Tsukasa
message: "Wait, Y-Yuki..."

name: Yuki
message: "Look, your boobs are so soft, too."

name: Tsukasa
message: "Y-You can't do that... Ah, ahn!"

name: Tsukasa
message: "Stop, you can't touch me down there. Y-You can't call that a joke!"

name: Kagami
message: "J-Just how stupid are you?"

name: Yuki
message: "Hahahaha... Oops."

name: Yuki
message: "I just thought you might come back if I messed with Tsukasa."

name: Kagami
message: "Wh-What do you mean?!"

name: Yuki
message: "Don't ask me."

name: Kagami
message: "Y-You're teasing me again!"

name: Yuki
message: "Maybe I am, maybe I'm not!"

name: Tsukasa
message: "You just wanted to walk home together with us, right?"

name: Yuki
message: "Huh?"

name: Tsukasa
message: "That's it, isn't it?"

name: Yuki
message: "Y-Yeah."

name: Kagami
message: "Together?"

name: Tsukasa
message: "That's right. Our houses are right next to each other, after all. We used to walk to school together all the time."

name: Kagami
message: "Yeah, we used to..."

name: Tsukasa
message: "Yeah, but we could do it again if we wanted."

name: Kagami
message: "Well, all right. We haven't really seen Yuki all that much lately."

name: Tsukasa
message: "Yeah, let's walk home together."

name: Yuki
message: "S-Sure."
Walk home? I wasn't planning on heading back yet...

name: Tsukasa
message: "All right, let's go!"
I went back the way I'd just come, rocking back and forth with the movement of the train.
I suppose it's my fault for getting up so late, though...
Well, it's not a big deal.
My only real goal was to go buy the CD. I didn't have anything else to do in particular, so there was no reason I couldn't go home.
No reason at all.
That said, my days off are short. Too short.
And every other day is ridiculously long.
My days off pass by in the blink of an eye.
The sun hung low in the sky.
The sky doesn't change colors based on the day, but it does change based on the time.
The sky slowly changed from blue to yellow and then eventually dyed the buildings purple.
What a beautiful sunset.
Just looking out at the unchanging scenery made my body feel utterly exhausted.
So the sunset was a little invigorating.
But maybe that's just because the sunlight was going directly into my eyes, banishing my fatigue.
The sunset was pretty, but it wasn't kind on the eyes.
I looked out the window as the scenery, which was beautiful and yet harsh on the eyes, flowed from right to left. Right to left.
It flowed and flowed.
And as the scenery flowed, the shades of purple amongst it continued to darken.

name: Tsukasa
message: "Hey, Yuki, weren't you talking to someone earlier?"

name: Yuki
message: "Oh, yeah. I guess so."

name: Yuki
message: "It was Takashima-san from the next class over. She suddenly came and started talking to me."

name: Kagami
message: "Takashima-san? I didn't know you two were acquaintances."

name: Yuki
message: "Ahahaha. We really aren't. I'm not as sociable as you two."

name: Kagami
message: "No way. You're way better than either of us, at least when it comes to pushing people's buttons."
Oh, wow. She's still mad.

name: Tsukasa
message: "But it'd be nice if you could get along with Takashima-san."

name: Yuki
message: "What do you mean?"

name: Tsukasa
message: "It's kind of..."

name: Kagami
message: "That Zakuro girl seems to be getting bullied."

name: Tsukasa
message: "I heard it stopped for a while, but it seems like it's starting to happen again."

name: Tsukasa
message: "I just thought you were the type of person who'd be nice to someone like that."

name: Yuki
message: "I see. Of course, I won't go out of my way to avoid her, but it's not like I'm going to hunt her down and make friends either."

name: Tsukasa
message: "Do you find it a bit hard to talk to her, too?"

name: Yuki
message: "I find it a bit hard to talk to everyone. I hate people. I always have, really."

name: Tsukasa
message: "But you're talking to us right now."

name: Yuki
message: "That's because we've always been together, since we were kids."

name: Tsukasa
message: "Yeah. You were like our big brother."

name: Yuki
message: "That breaks my heart every time I hear it."

name: Tsukasa
message: "But your hair was so short back then, and you wore pants, and you never lost to anyone in a fight."

name: Yuki
message: "That's just because they were comfortable to wear."

name: Kagami
message: "And you always talked like a boy too."

name: Yuki
message: "That's... How should I put it, uh..."

name: Kagami
message: "And what kind of girl practices martial arts? Until the day you suddenly started wearing a skirt, we always thought you were a boy."

name: Tsukasa
message: "Yeah, I wasn't really sure how to react when I found out the dashing prince that always rescued us was actually a princess."

name: Yuki
message: "You say that like it was obvious. I never even realized you thought I was a boy."

name: Kagami
message: "Even if you didn't know it, you were a prince to us. Not just in fights, either. You're really good at sports, and you're smart too."

name: Kagami
message: "Just looking at you now makes me want to ask for a refund on my feelings."

name: Yuki
message: "Your feelings? What do you mean?"

name: Kagami
message: "Uahh!"

name: Kagami
message: "N-Nothing! Um... I'm just saying, I thought you were a boy at the time, so I acted differently around you!"

name: Yuki
message: "I don't remember anything like that."

name: Kagami
message: "Wh-Who cares about what you think? I did my best! Wh-Why can't you at least notice something like that?"

name: Yuki
message: "O-Okay..."
Takashima Zakuro.
I didn't know her very well, but she always seemed like a really lonely person.
I definitely remembered her being ignored by people in the past.
Maybe you could call that bullying.
All this...
All this thinking was...
Making me tired...

name: Kagami
message: "Hey, Yuki, we're getting off."

name: Tsukasa
message: "Hey."

name: Yuki
message: "Huh?"

name: Kagami
message: "She's still snoozing. Come on!"

name: Yuki
message: "Yeah, sure..."

name: Kagami
message: "Haa... We almost missed our stop."

name: Yuki
message: "Oh, I didn't even realize that I was so sleepy."

name: Kagami
message: "I don't know how you can sleep like that, hanging over the railing."

name: Yuki
message: "Sleeping is my specialty!"

name: Kagami
message: "Haa... Why are you so proud of that?"

name: Yuki
message: "I've been really tired lately. I fall asleep all the time. Just like that, my brain shuts off. It's like time is flying by."

name: Kagami
message: "They say time is money, but I've never met anyone who values their money less than you."

name: Yuki
message: "The sun already set before I knew it."

name: Tsukasa
message: "Ahahahaha. Anyway, it's going to be summer pretty soon."

name: Yuki
message: "I see. Finals are over, so we get a vacation soon."

name: Tsukasa
message: "Do you have any plans for the summer?"

name: Kagami
message: "Nothing but sleeping, I'm sure."

name: Yuki
message: "That's not true. I have lots of things to do over the summer."

name: Kagami
message: "Like what?"

name: Yuki
message: "Waking up, eating breakfast, brushing my teeth, washing my face, drinking tea, and so on. There's plenty of stuff to do in the summer!"

name: Kagami
message: "I mean after that. What are you going to do after you get up, eat, brush your teeth, and wash your face?"

name: Yuki
message: "I wonder... Maybe I'll go back to sleep."

name: Kagami
message: "Haa... So I was right all along."

name: Yuki
message: "What about you?"

name: Kagami
message: "I'm taking classes over the summer, so I won't be able to spend as much time with my club."

name: Yuki
message: "Why am I not surprised..."

name: Kagami
message: "How about you? Are you planning on studying?"

name: Yuki
message: "Not even a little."

name: Kagami
message: "And we used to call you a genius."

name: Yuki
message: "They say geniuses are just normal people after age twenty."

name: Kagami
message: "Then what's your excuse?"

name: Yuki
message: "I'm doing my best."

name: Tsukasa
message: "Heheh."

name: Kagami
message: "What's so funny?"

name: Tsukasa
message: "Nothing. I was thinking that it's been a while since we've been together like this."

name: Yuki
message: "Has it?"

name: Tsukasa
message: "Yeah. Back then we thought you were a boy."

name: Kagami
message: "Enough of that!"

name: Yuki
message: "My hair was short, and I wore pants, and of course I was flat as a board."

name: Kagami
message: "Of course. There's no way a grade schooler would have huge boobs."

name: Tsukasa
message: "Back then, you were really strong. You protected me and Onee-chan."

name: Yuki
message: "Violence was my only redeeming feature."

name: Kagami
message: "And your grades. You were the best student in the class. Actually, probably the best in the entire ward."

name: Yuki
message: "Like I said, plenty of people are smart when they're young."

name: Kagami
message: "It's just that you started skipping."

name: Tsukasa
message: "Onee-chan..."

name: Kagami
message: "No matter what reason there was..."

name: Yuki
message: "You're right."

name: Yuki
message: "But who cares? That's something for me to worry about. It's not like you ought to be upset just because I got stupid."

name: Kagami
message: "Of course not. I-I... Of course I don't care... Not at all."

name: Kagami
message: "I-It's just unpleasant watching you waste away your life."

name: Yuki
message: "Ouch, that's brutal. There are tons of different kinds of people in this world. You can't let them all get on your nerves."

name: Kagami
message: "I'm not talking about all the people in the world. I'm saying it's unpleasant watching you."

name: Tsukasa
message: "Onee-chan..."

name: Tsukasa
message: "Oh... I, I got it!"

name: Tsukasa
message: "Tomorrow, let's all walk to school together."

name: Yuki
message: "Wh―What do you mean, 'I got it'?"

name: Tsukasa
message: "Hmm? It's because we haven't been together like this in a long time."

name: Yuki
message: "And why exactly does that mean we have to walk to school together?"

name: Tsukasa
message: "Plus, you've been skipping a lot lately, Yuki."

name: Yuki
message: "That's not what I'm asking. And I'm not skipping."

name: Tsukasa
message: "You are."

name: Yuki
message: "Well, you see, I've just calculated how many days I can take off or be late without flunking."

name: Tsukasa
message: "Three tardies is one absence, right?"

name: Yuki
message: "Right. And if you skip more than one in four classes, you won't get credit regardless of your exam grade."

name: Tsukasa
message: "I see."

name: Yuki
message: "But if you don't skip more than a fourth of your classes, it has no effect on your grade whatsoever."

name: Tsukasa
message: "Oh, I see."

name: Kagami
message: "Hey, you shouldn't be impressed by that."

name: Tsukasa
message: "A-Ahahaha. It's just that she's right, you know?"

name: Kagami
message: "The people who know about that rule are more likely to fail, though."

name: Yuki
message: "Not at all."

name: Kagami
message: "Shut up. Anyway, don't even think about skipping tomorrow."

name: Tsukasa
message: "See ya, Yuki."

name: Yuki
message: "Sure."

name: Tsukasa
message: "Let's walk together tomorrow, okay?"

name: Yuki
message: "I'll probably be sleeping, though."

name: Tsukasa
message: "We'll come wake you up."

name: Kagami
message: "That's right. Prepare yourself."

name: Yuki
message: "Just a question. Why would I need to prepare myself for being woken up?"

name: Kagami
message: "You'll see. Heheheh."

name: Yuki
message: "Ahahaha... Stay away from me."

name: Tsukasa
message: "That's a joke. Right, Onee-chan?"

name: Kagami
message: "I dunno. Maybe it is a joke, heheh."

name: Yuki
message: "What are you implying?"

name: Yuki
message: "Here we go, for today..."
I took out the CD I bought.
I bought a rock CD today.
Rock.
But this is an album by that band that led the British pop movement years and years ago.
So it's not rock... but pop music?
What's the difference between rock and pop?
With my mind full of questions, I put the CD into the player.
And closed it.

name: Yuki
message: "Huh?"

name: Yuki
message: "What's up with this CD?"
The music that came from the CD player wasn't rock or Brit pop. It was...

name: Yuki
message: "It's anime music."

name: Yuki
message: "Oh?"
I checked the CD.
Written there was...
Is that name... a voice actress?

name: Yuki
message: "Oh?"
Why did I buy this?

name: Yuki
message: "The first album from the popular actress..."
They switched my bag with someone else's!
Or maybe I accidentally grabbed someone else's bag on the train!

name: Yuki
message: "Or maybe..."

name: Yuki
message: "Is this one of Kagami's pranks? I won't forgive her!"
I ran to the phone and yelled at Kagami, but she ripped my ear off in return.
It sounded like she wasn't involved.
My rock CD...
